name: aivatar-session-bridge
description: Report Codex session presence and task status to the local Aivatar bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex session status to Aivatar.
interface.longDescription: Reports the current Codex thread as an Aivatar agent session through the local HTTP bridge, including presence, task state, and tool-activity heartbeat updates.
defaultPrompt: Connect this Codex session to Aivatar.
Report this task's status to Aivatar.
